title: cryptandra subtilis
intro: Cryptandra subtilis is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Epacridaceae, and is commonly known as the 'Mountain Cryptandra'. The medicinal properties of Cryptandra subtilis include its ability to inhibit bacterial and fungal growth, making it a potential antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Cryptandra subtilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Australian herbal medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
